title: Add inline todo editing
summary: Added inline editing on branch todo/session-inline-edit, later integrated into todo/working-set-editor where state declarations and header copy overlap with search and persistence work.
goal: Make the todo list editable in place so users can quickly fix or refine task titles.
changesMade: Added an editing state keyed by todo id
Replaced the static title label with an inline input when editing
Added save and cancel actions beside each todo row

features.name: inline todo editing
features.why: Users should be able to fix a task title directly in the list instead of recreating the item.

decisions.decision: Put edit controls inside each todo row
decisions.why: The edit action should stay attached to the row being changed and not require a separate modal.

blockers: Merging with search and persistence changes the same state declarations and top panel layout in App.jsx.
openQuestions: Should save trigger on blur or only on explicit button click?
How should inline editing behave when search narrows the visible working set?
resumePrompt: Continue the inline editing work. Preserve per-row edit controls and in-place title editing when resolving conflicts on todo/working-set-editor or todo/conflict-resolution.
